title: StoryPipeline
description: Per-feature per-story pipeline state for the streaming design->build workflow (FEIP-7565). The design lane runs ahead, moving each story designing -> awaiting-gate -> ready; the single build lane consumes the FIFO build_queue one story at a time (build_active), then -> done. The Scrum-Master owns this; persisted as .tdd/features/<F>/pipeline.json. Exactly one story builds at a time.

stories.description: Keyed by story id (S<n>[-slug]). Every story the design lane has touched.

status.description: designing = design lane drafting/annotating/ordering; awaiting-gate = surfaced to the PO for the per-story spec gate; ready = gate-approved, queued for build; building = the single build lane is on it; done = built.

build_queue.description: FIFO of gate-approved (ready) story ids waiting for the single build lane. The head is dispatched next when the lane is free.

build_active.description: The story id the single Navigator+Driver build lane is currently building, or null when idle. At most one.
